title: Mir Report Contract Schema
description: Standard report format declared by start-harness (phase-6 §9). Required when a task reaches REPORT state. Format varies by task_type (concise_report_v1, audit_report_v1, research_report_v1). R7-C-I1  —  phase-6 §9 YAML   schema    .

contract_name.description: Selected report contract. start-harness's 5-  (phase-1 §3) must declare which contract is required at REPORT state.

run_id.description: ULID of the parent run_state. report_contract is created once per run when entering REPORT state.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of report generation.

generated_by.description: Which lane authored this report (typically Claude, since REPORT is in control lane).

changed_files.description: Absolute or repo-relative paths of files modified during this run.

result.description: Aggregated verification result. pass=all checks green, partial=some advisory warnings, fail=at least one blocking check failed.

evidence_ref.description: Optional path to full verification log (e.g., 'tasks/tdd.json#entry_id').

verification.description: Required field. VERIFY state output projected into report.

risks.description: One-line risk statements (e.g., 'config schema may need migration', 'rollback path untested').

next_steps.description: One-line follow-up actions for future runs/tasks.

audit_findings.description: Only populated when contract_name == audit_report_v1. R7 audit-style findings.

fields.description: Contract-specific fields. concise_report_v1 uses changed_files+verification+risks+next_steps+artifacts; audit_report_v1 adds audit_findings.
